reasoning_content:
The submittal transmittal says "Declared deviations: NONE" but the ontology shows a DEVIATION status. The issue seems to be that the submittal was reviewed against "Issued for Construction Rev 0" but ADD-001 amends that spec, so the review doesn't account for addendum changes. That's the core non-compliance issue.

Now the certification readiness also says there are "live spec deviations on installed equipment" citing SUB-236426-01 and SUB-263353-01.

Let me also check the SUB-263353-01 document.
